common.tagline: The digital platform for your homeowners' association
common.slowConnection: The connection seems slow. Check your internet.
common.errorBody: Try again or contact your administrator.
common.notImplemented: This feature is registered but its page is not available in this build.
common.featureDisabled: This feature is not enabled for your association.

auth.noAsociatie: You don't have an association configured yet.
auth.demoMode: Demo mode — no backend configured. Displayed data is sample data.

onboarding.title: Association setup
onboarding.name: Association name
onboarding.csvHelp: Upload a CSV with columns: scara, etaj, numar_apartament, suprafata_utila, cota_parte_indiviza, proprietar_principal_name
onboarding.csvError: The file could not be read. Check the column format.
onboarding.selectFeatures: Choose the features to enable. You can change these anytime.
onboarding.finishHint: After finishing you can generate invite codes for residents.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Enable or disable association features. Disabled ones disappear for residents.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.empty: No announcements published yet. You'll be notified when the administrator posts something.

polls.title: Polls
polls.empty: No active polls. The committee will announce proposals here.

tickets.title: Issues
tickets.empty: No open issues. If you notice a problem in the building, report it with the button below.
tickets.submitted: Issue submitted. You'll be notified at each status change.

events.title: Events calendar
events.empty: No scheduled events. The committee will announce the next General Assembly here.

locator.title: Neighbour posts
locator.subtitle: Informal neighbour-to-neighbour posts. Auto-archived after 14 days.
locator.empty: No active posts. Publish the first one with the button above.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Search quick answers to common questions.
faq.empty: No results. Try other terms or ask your administrator.

ideas.title: Idea box
ideas.subtitle: Suggest ideas for the building. The most-voted reach the committee agenda.
ideas.empty: No ideas yet. Suggest the first one with the button above.

surveys.title: Opinion surveys
surveys.subtitle: Non-binding surveys. Anonymous by default, no quorum.

repairs.title: Repair history
repairs.subtitle: Search past building repairs and check warranties.
repairs.empty: No repairs found. Adjust the filters or search term.

bikes.title: Bike room
bikes.subtitle: Registry of bikes in the shared room. Helps recover stolen bikes and identify abandoned ones.
bikes.searchPlaceholder: Search by description, serial or owner…
bikes.empty: No bikes registered. Add the first one with the button above.

lending.title: Borrowable items
lending.subtitle: Tools and items neighbours lend out. Message the owner directly.
lending.name: Item
lending.empty: No items listed. Add the first one with the button above.

meters.title: Meter readings
meters.subtitle: Submit your meter indices monthly, between the 1st and 5th.
meters.errorBelowPrevious: The index cannot be lower than the previous one.
meters.anomaly: Unusually high consumption. Check the value — it will be flagged for the administrator.

pets.title: Pets
pets.subtitle: Opt-in registry of building pets. Helps reunite lost pets and arrange mutual care.
pets.name: Name
pets.empty: No pets registered. Add the first one with the button above.

directory.title: Neighbours
directory.subtitle: A contact directory between neighbours. You appear only if you opt in.
directory.consentHint: You control what others see. Change it anytime.
directory.empty: No neighbours listed yet. Be the first to opt in above.

thankyous.title: Wall of thanks
thankyous.subtitle: Publicly thank a neighbour who lent a hand.
thankyous.empty: No messages yet. Be the first to thank a neighbour.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Definitions for terms from bills and General Assemblies.
glossary.empty: No term found. Try another word.

warranties.title: Equipment warranties
warranties.subtitle: Track warranties for the lift, pump, boiler and more so you can claim in time.
warranties.empty: No warranties tracked. Add the first one with the button above.

emergency.title: Emergency numbers
emergency.empty: The administrator hasn't configured emergency numbers yet.

alerts.title: Building alerts
alerts.confirmSend: This alert will be sent immediately to all residents, bypassing quiet hours. Continue?
alerts.empty: No emergency alerts have been sent.

apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.empty: No apartments imported. Use the import step in setup.

visitors.title: Observed visitors
visitors.subtitle: Quickly report suspicious people or situations. Neighbours see recent reports and the committee can mark them resolved.
visitors.noteHint: What did you notice? Time, place, description…
visitors.added: Report submitted. Thanks for letting neighbours know.
visitors.empty: No reports. Use the button above if you notice something suspicious.

marketplace.title: Internal marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Sell or give away items to neighbours before OLX. Listings auto-expire after 14 days.
marketplace.priceHint: Leave empty or 0 if you are giving it away.
marketplace.empty: No active listings. Post the first one with the button above.

feedback.title: Platform feedback
feedback.subtitle: Tell us what works well and what we could improve about IntreVecini.
feedback.bodyHint: Describe the idea, problem or praise…
feedback.empty: No feedback yet. Be the first to write to us.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Statute, rules, contracts and cadastral documents. Search by title or content.
documents.empty: No documents found. Adjust the filters or add a new one.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Supplier catalog with contract dates and alerts before expiry.
suppliers.name: Name
suppliers.kindHint: e.g. water, gas, waste, elevator, internet
suppliers.empty: No suppliers registered. Add the first with the button above.

storage.title: Storage rooms
storage.subtitle: Registry of storage rooms and outbuildings — who owns each storage space.
storage.label: Label / location
storage.apartmentHint: Leave empty if the room is unassigned.
storage.searchPlaceholder: Search by label, apartment or notes…
storage.empty: No storage rooms registered. Add the first with the button above.

carpool.title: Carpooling
carpool.subtitle: Find neighbours with similar commutes to share the ride. Opt-in profile.
carpool.searchPlaceholder: Search by destination, schedule or name…
carpool.saved: Profile saved. Neighbours with similar commutes can find you.
carpool.empty: No carpooling profiles. Add yours with the button above.

birthdays.title: Birthdays
birthdays.subtitle: Birthday greetings for neighbours who opted in. Only day and month are shown.
birthdays.left: You opted out of birthday display.
birthdays.empty: Nobody has shared their birthday yet. Add yours.

energy.title: Energy
energy.subtitle: Track common-area energy use (lighting, lift, heating) month by month.
energy.amountHint: e.g. kWh or m³ as applicable.
energy.empty: No readings recorded. Add the first with the button above.

multiyear.title: Multi-year maintenance plan
multiyear.subtitle: Plan major works across several years to build up the repair fund ahead of time.
multiyear.costHint: Leave empty if not estimated yet.
multiyear.empty: No plan items. Add the first work with the button above.

access.title: Courier access
access.subtitle: Generate a temporary intercom code for couriers. The code expires in {{minutes}} minutes.
access.generated: Code generated. Send it to the courier.
access.empty: No code generated. Tap “Generate code” when you expect a courier.

sitters.title: Babysitting / pet-sitting
sitters.subtitle: Trusted neighbours offering childcare or pet care. Opt-in profile.
sitters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, availability or rate…
sitters.empty: No profiles. Add yours with the button above.

barter.title: Skill exchange
barter.subtitle: “I fix your bike, you help me with Excel.” Offer and find services among neighbours.
barter.offersHint: What services or skills can you offer?
barter.needsHint: What do you need help with?
barter.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, offer or need…
barter.empty: No offers. Add yours with the button above.

groupbuys.title: Group buys
groupbuys.subtitle: “I’m ordering 50 kg of potatoes from the farm, who’s in?” Coordinate bulk orders.
groupbuys.empty: No active orders. Start the first with the button above.

maintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Recurring services and checks: boiler, lift ISCIR, pest control. See what's coming up and what's overdue.
maintenance.markedDone: Task marked done. Next due date rescheduled.
maintenance.empty: No scheduled tasks. Add the first with the button above.

parking.title: Parking
parking.subtitle: Registry of parking spots: who uses each spot and which car. Search by spot, apartment or plate.
parking.searchPlaceholder: Search by spot, apartment or plate…
parking.label: Spot (label)
parking.empty: No parking spots. Add the first with the button above.

petitions.title: Internal petitions
petitions.subtitle: Start a petition and gather signatures. Once the threshold is met, it is forwarded to the committee automatically.
petitions.empty: No petitions. Start the first with the button above.

crowdfund.title: Crowdfunding
crowdfund.subtitle: Voluntary contributions to small projects (playground, decorations). A pledge isn't a payment — just a commitment.
crowdfund.empty: No projects. Start the first with the button above.

repairfund.title: Repair fund
repairfund.subtitle: Estimate a recommended monthly repair-fund rate based on the building's age and last major works.
repairfund.invalid: Fill in the building details to see a recommendation.
repairfund.rationale: Base {{base}} + age {{age}} + overdue works {{works}} lei/m². Guidance for the AGA discussion, not a legal requirement.

psi.title: Fire-safety (PSI) checks
psi.subtitle: Due dates for mandatory checks: extinguishers, hydrants, electrical. See what's overdue.
psi.markedChecked: Check recorded. Next due date rescheduled.
psi.dueBanner: {{n}} checks are overdue or coming due.
psi.empty: No assets tracked. Add the first with the button above.

insurance.title: Building insurance
insurance.subtitle: The building's insurance policy: insurer, number and renewal date, with an alert before expiry.
insurance.renewBanner: {{n}} policies are expiring or expired — schedule renewal.
insurance.empty: No policies recorded. Add the first with the button above.

keys.title: Key registry
keys.subtitle: Who holds the keys to shared spaces (basement, terrace, boiler room). Important when someone leaves the committee.
keys.empty: No keys recorded. Add the first with the button above.

anonymous.title: Anonymous message to the committee
anonymous.subtitle: Send a report to the committee without revealing your identity. The system retains the sender only to prevent abuse.
anonymous.bodyHint: Describe the situation. The committee won't see who sent it.
anonymous.privacyNote: Your identity stays hidden from the committee. Only the platform admin can de-anonymize it, with an audit-log entry.
anonymous.pendingBanner: {{count}} messages are awaiting a committee response.

pv.title: Meeting minutes
pv.subtitle: Searchable archive of signed minutes (general assembly, committee meetings, works acceptance).
pv.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, category or content…
pv.contentHint: Searchable text — a summary of the decisions.

rfp.title: Request for proposals
rfp.subtitle: Post a request for proposals, collect contractor quotes and pick the winning one transparently.
rfp.empty: No requests yet. Create the first with the button above.

duty.title: Neighbor on duty
duty.subtitle: A weekend volunteer for small emergencies (let in a plumber, sign for parcels). Sign up for a free weekend.
duty.nobodyOnDuty: No volunteer on duty this weekend.

green.title: Plants / green spaces
green.subtitle: Volunteer schedule for watering plants, mowing the lawn and tending the courtyard. Sign up for a free task.

wiki.title: Building wiki
wiki.subtitle: Collaborative local knowledge: how to shut off the water, what to do if the lift jams, where the keys are.
wiki.empty: No pages found. Create the first with the button above.

contractors.title: Contractors
contractors.subtitle: Library of vetted contractors from past projects, with specialty, price tier and rating.
contractors.name: Name
contractors.empty: No contractors. Add the first with the button above.

alarm.title: Alarm system
alarm.subtitle: Status of alarm and detection systems, test schedule and recent activations.
alarm.attentionBanner: {{count}} systems need attention (faulty or overdue test).
alarm.name: System name
alarm.empty: No systems recorded. Add the first with the button above.

discussions.title: Discussion channel
discussions.subtitle: Informal resident discussions, moderated by the committee. Organised by topic (#parking, #cleaning, #neighbours).
discussions.empty: No discussion threads yet. Start the first with the button above.

budget.title: Participatory budget
budget.subtitle: The committee allocates a discretionary fund. Submit ideas and vote — the most-voted that fit the budget get funded.
budget.empty: No proposals yet. Add the first with the button above.

priorities.title: Major-project priorities
priorities.subtitle: Rank major projects by priority. The committee uses the ranking before the formal AGA proposal.
priorities.empty: No projects yet. Add the first with the button above.

laundry.title: Laundry booking
laundry.subtitle: Book a slot on the shared washing machines and dryer. See what's taken and cancel your own bookings.
laundry.empty: No bookings yet. Book the first slot with the button above.
